result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.creat...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
),
-- Owner assignments are case history rows where the owner changed
owner_hist AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
-- transfers credited to old_owner
transfers AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH FROM REPLACE(old_owner, '#', '')) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(BOTH FROM old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
-- agents who handled >0 cases during window: anyone appearing as old or new owner in owner history
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(BOTH FROM REPLACE(owner_val, '#', '')) AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_val FROM owner_hist
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_val FROM owner_hist
  ) x
  WHERE owner_val IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(BOTH FROM owner_val) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
),
-- Owner assignments are case history rows where the owner changed
owner_hist AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_dt AND ch.createddate < p.as_of + INTERVAL '1 day'
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
-- transfers credited to old_owner
transfers AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH FROM REPLACE(old_owner, '#', '')) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(BOTH FROM old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
-- agents who handled >0 cases during window: anyone appearing as old or new owner in owner history
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(BOTH FROM REPLACE(owner_val, '#', '')) AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_val FROM owner_hist
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_val FROM owner_hist
  ) x
  WHERE owner_val IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(BOTH FROM owner_val) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
),
owner_hist AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
         ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
         ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt::timestamp
              AND ch.createddate::timestamp < (p.as_of::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT TRIM(BOTH FROM REPLACE(old_owner, '#', '')) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(BOTH FROM old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(BOTH FROM REPLACE(owner_val, '#', '')) AS agent_id
  FROM (
    SELECT old_owner AS owner_val FROM owner_hist
    UNION ALL
    SELECT new_owner AS owner_val FROM owner_hist
  ) x
  WHERE owner_val IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(BOTH FROM owner_val) <> ''
)
SELECT ha.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agents ha
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = ha.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, ha.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM casehistory__c ch, params p
WHERE ch.field__c='Owner'
  AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt::timestamp
  AND ch.createddate::timestamp < (p.as_of::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day');

FROM casehistory__c ch, params p
WHERE ch.field__c='Owner'
  AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt::timestamp
  AND ch.createddate::timestamp < (p.as_of::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day');

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
)
SELECT TRIM(BOTH FROM REPLACE(owner_val, '#','')) AS agent_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS cases_handled
FROM (
  SELECT id, ownerid, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM "Case"
) c, params p,
LATERAL (SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_val) ov
WHERE c.created_ts >= p.start_dt::timestamp
  AND c.created_ts < (p.as_of::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day')
  AND ov.owner_val IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(BOTH FROM ov.owner_val) <> ''
GROUP BY 1;

       COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS cases_handled

  FROM "Case"
) c, params p,
LATERAL (SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_val) ov
WHERE c.created_ts >= p.start_dt::timestamp
  AND c.created_ts < (p.as_of::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day')
  AND ov.owner_val IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(BOTH FROM ov.owner_val) <> ''
GROUP BY 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2023-04-10' AS as_of,
         DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_dt
),
owner_hist AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         TRIM(BOTH FROM REPLACE(ch.oldvalue__c, '#','')) AS old_owner_id,
         ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt::timestamp
              AND ch.createddate::timestamp < (p.as_of::timestamp + INTERVAL '1 day')
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
)
SELECT old_owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
FROM owner_hist
WHERE old_owner_id IS NOT NULL AND old_owner_id <> ''
GROUP BY 1;

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_m0hG4ENcGiZGgKH0Hn7PSIaB)
# all transfer counts are zero (no owner history in window)
df['transfer_count'] = 0
# choose min transfer_count then smallest agent_id
agent_id = df.sort_values(['transfer_count','agent_id']).iloc[0]['agent_id']
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({'Id': agent_id}))

import json, pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_m0hG4ENcGiZGgKH0Hn7PSIaB)
# all transfer counts are zero (no owner history in window)
df['transfer_count'] = 0
